page_content:
ANTH299 Student Initiated Course (1-3 Credits)

Student Initiated Course (STIC) in Anthropology. Course is student initiated and taught under close supervision of a faculty mentor. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Additional Information: ANTH299 will serve as a "special topics” kind of number for any Student Initiated Courses (STIC) offered in Anthropology. So far, we have only offered one ANTH299A, sample syllabus attached.
